name: Priya Nair
notableTransitions: Transitioned from a focused frontend internship to a data engineering internship, expanding to ETL, data warehousing, and analytics tooling.
Graduated with a CS degree and pursued internships in both frontend and data engineering to explore software career paths.
Moved toward securing a first full-time software role after academia, signaling intent to build a long-term IC career.
tensions: Limited professional experience (internships only) versus expectations for impact at scale in a full-time role.
Title-vs-impact gap: internship-level responsibilities with measurable outcomes, but limited scope for broader ownership.
Breadth across frontend and data engineering may create ambiguity about a defined specialization.
Credential gap (no full-time role yet) and no advanced certifications beyond a BS in CS.
